notes: Tested whether the engineering layer contradicts, weakens, or inverts. (1) Does it weaken avyayām? No — preserved as imperishable, with the 2.17 / 2.21 mirror surfaced. (2) Does it invert the bhūtāni kathayiṣyanti claim? No — preserved as 'long-lived signal that peers use to model you.' (3) Does it import 'reputation is everything' connotation? Explicitly no — falsifiability excludes performance-theatre and personal-branding. (4) Does it drop the sambhāvitasya restriction? No — explicitly preserved in both the falsifiability and counter_example. Reverse-translate: a Sanskrit reader reading only the engineering layer would reconstruct a stance compatible with avyayām akīrtim + bhūtāni + sambhāvitasya — the imperishable-signal, the speech-propagation, and the prior-honour asymmetry are all reconstructable. PASS on both 3.6 and 7.10.
